message:
feat(layout,core,parser,render): expand layout engine, refine parsers and renderers

- fm-layout/lib.rs: major layout engine expansion with improved node
  placement algorithms and edge routing logic
- fm-layout/persistence.rs: improve layout state serialization and
  cache invalidation
- fm-layout/spatial.rs: fix spatial indexing edge case
- fm-core/quotient_filter.rs: improve quotient filter accuracy and
  capacity handling
- fm-core/succinct.rs: fix succinct data structure bit manipulation
- fm-parser/dot_parser.rs: fix DOT format parsing edge case
- fm-parser/mermaid_parser.rs: clean up Mermaid parser, remove dead code
- fm-render-canvas/renderer.rs: remove unused canvas rendering code
- fm-render-svg: improve SVG output and accessibility annotations
- fm-render-term/ascii.rs: fix terminal ASCII rendering edge case
- Update golden test for xychart_basic.svg
- Fix evidence CLI minor issue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
